title: Corporate Gift Card Policy
description: What are the best practices for issuing and managing corporate gift cards across multiple retailers?
narrative: The user is a HR manager of a mid‑size company who wants to implement an employee recognition program using gift cards. They need to know which issuers provide the most flexible terms (e.g., no restrictions on promotional items, clear expiration dates, and easy balance checking), how to track redemption across different store chains, and what compliance considerations (tax reporting, purchase limits, blackout periods) must be followed. Relevance criteria include vendor policies, multi‑retailer acceptance, tracking features, and regulatory compliance information.

title: Sustainable Food Packaging
description: What are the latest innovations in biodegradable packaging materials for perishable food products, and how do they affect shelf life and consumer perception?
narrative: The user is a food manufacturer looking to replace conventional plastic packaging with eco‑friendly alternatives. Relevance is limited to contemporary research (2015 or later), specific mentions of biodegradable polymers such as PLA, PBAT, or PHA, documented studies on shelf‑life performance, and consumer acceptance data. Documents that do not address these criteria are considered irrelevant.

title: SUV Interior Space vs. Fuel Efficiency
description: I need to compare the interior storage capacity and fuel consumption of mid‑size SUVs for a family trip.
narrative: The user wants detailed interior space measurements (cargo volume, seat dimensions) alongside fuel efficiency data (MPG or L/100 km) for several midsize SUVs. Relevance requires precise quantitative specs and excludes subjective reviews or aftermarket modifications.

title: Veal Paupiettes Pairings
description: Which vegetables best complement veal paupiettes in a balanced dish?
narrative: The user seeks guidance on selecting vegetables to accompany veal paupiettes, taking into account flavor profiles, textures, seasonality, cooking methods, and any dietary constraints. Relevant documents should describe specific vegetable options, preparation techniques, and how they interact with the dish to create a cohesive, appealing meal.

title: Pet Heat Protection
description: What evidence-based measures and products can prevent overheating hazards for pets inside cars during hot weather?
narrative: The user is a pet owner seeking guidelines, product recommendations, and scientific studies on vehicle interior temperature control to keep dogs and cats safe. Relevant documents should include studies on heat dynamics, product performance data, regulatory standards, and best practice guidelines for pet transport in vehicles.

title: Compact Boat Heating Options
description: What are the best compact heating solutions for small boats to maintain temperature without compromising space?
narrative: The user wants to identify efficient, space‑saving heating devices suitable for small boats, prioritizing low power consumption, safety, and ease of installation, and is looking for options that do not require large fuel storage or complex setups.

title: Hybrid SUV Warranty Search
description: I want to find certified pre‑owned hybrid SUVs under €20,000 that offer at least a 3‑year manufacturer warranty, have under 20,000 km mileage, and have EU safety and emissions certification.
narrative: The user is a cost‑conscious buyer interested in long‑term reliability and peace of mind. Relevance should be based on vehicles that are: (1) hybrid powertrain, (2) certified pre‑owned with a factory warranty of three years or more, (3) priced below €20,000 in the current market, (4) have a verified mileage record of less than 20,000 km, and (5) meet EU safety and emissions standards. Documents describing new models, unrelated brands, or vehicles outside the price/mileage bracket should be considered irrelevant. The user also values transparency in vehicle history and wants options that are currently available for immediate purchase.

title: AI in Healthcare Ethics
description: What are the current ethical concerns surrounding the deployment of artificial intelligence systems in patient care?
narrative: The user wants to identify scholarly articles that discuss ethical frameworks, legal implications, and confidentiality issues related to AI-driven diagnostics and treatment recommendation engines. Relevance requires peer‑reviewed sources published in the last five years, specifically addressing patient privacy, bias mitigation, and accountability mechanisms in clinical settings.

title: Heritage Renovation Materials
description: What sustainable building materials are recommended for renovating historic urban architecture?
narrative: The user seeks guidance on selecting eco‑friendly, low‑impact materials that meet preservation standards for historic buildings, including details on performance, compatibility with original construction, and regulatory compliance.

title: Blockchain Land Registry
description: How can blockchain technology be implemented to improve transparency and reduce fraud in land registration systems?
narrative: User seeks technical, legal, and case‑study evidence on pilots, smart contracts, scalability, and interoperability with existing land registries. Relevant sources should detail regulatory frameworks, stakeholder interviews, and comparative analyses of implemented systems. Exclude generic blockchain overviews not specifically tied to land registration.

title: EV Home‑Charging Economics
description: How do different residential EV charging configurations affect monthly electricity bills and overall environmental impact for apartment dwellers in a hot climate?
narrative: The user is an apartment resident living in a hot, densely populated city who owns an electric vehicle (EV). They want to determine which charging strategy—overnight, daytime, or time‑of‑use (TOU) tariffs—minimizes their monthly electric bill while also considering battery degradation and environmental benefits. Relevance criteria include data on electricity prices, grid demand patterns, battery health metrics under different charging regimes, cooling costs related to hot climates, and any available incentives or rebates for residential EV charging. The answer should reference studies, consumer reports, or regulatory reports that quantify these factors, and it should explain how each configuration impacts both cost and carbon emissions for the typical hot‑climate apartment user.}

title: Potato on Grass
description: I want to learn how to grow potatoes by laying seed tubers on mown grass in a small garden, what are the best practices and potential risks?
narrative: The user is a small‑garden or urban gardener seeking low‑maintenance potato cultivation using grass mulch. Relevant documents should explain timing, spacing, watering, pest management, soil preparation, yield expectations, and storage after harvest, and should discuss both advantages and challenges of growing potatoes on grass.

title: Printing and Politics
description: How did the early printing press influence European political thought from the 15th to 18th centuries?
narrative: The user seeks scholarly articles, primary sources, and analytical studies that demonstrate the causal relationship between the spread of printed works and shifts in political ideology, governance, and social movements.  Relevance criteria include peer‑reviewed journal papers, historical treatises, biographies of key political thinkers, and documented case studies from at least three distinct European regions.  Works that merely mention printing in passing or present anecdotal evidence without substantive analysis are considered non‑relevant.

title: Movember Effectiveness Across Nations
description: What evidence exists about the effectiveness of Movember campaigns in raising awareness and funds for prostate cancer across different countries over the past decade?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative analysis of Movember’s impact on prostate cancer awareness and fundraising, requiring data on donation totals, engagement metrics, outreach breadth, country‑specific outcomes, and studies evaluating program efficacy. An appropriate response should include reports, academic papers, and reputable sources that examine variations among nations, challenges faced, and measurable results of the campaign over the last ten years.

title: Cardiac Arrhythmia Guidelines
description: Where can I find the most recent evidence‑based guidelines for managing atrial fibrillation in elderly patients?
narrative: The user is a clinician seeking up‑to‑date, high‑quality recommendations for treating atrial fibrillation in patients over 80, focusing on pharmacologic therapy, rate versus rhythm control, and anticoagulation strategies. Relevance requires documents that present clinical practice guidelines, systematic reviews, or consensus statements published within the last five years, and that specifically address geriatric considerations such as frailty, renal function, and drug interactions. Non‑clinical papers, case reports, or older guidelines are excluded.

title: Artisan International Sales
description: What legal and logistical steps must a French artisan with Master Craftsman status follow to export handmade ceramics to Canada?
narrative: The user wants detailed information on France‑to‑Canada export regulations, tariff classifications, required certifications, packaging, shipping logistics, and relevant trade agreements specific to a Master Craftsman exporter; documents that discuss customs procedures, duty rates, and artisan‑export permits are considered relevant.

title: Adolescent Food Insecurity Mental Health
description: What is the relationship between food insecurity and mental health outcomes among adolescents in low‑income settings?
narrative: The user is a public health researcher interested in the intersection of nutrition and psychological wellbeing in adolescents living in resource‑constrained environments. Relevant documents should provide peer‑reviewed evidence (cross‑sectional, longitudinal, or intervention studies) that links measures of food insecurity (e.g., household food security surveys, SNAP‑like program participation) with validated mental health outcomes (e.g., depression, anxiety, suicidality, cognitive functioning). The user values quantitative analysis, effect size estimates, context‑specific findings (urban vs. rural, different regions), and discussion of mediating factors such as stress biology, socioeconomic status, and school engagement. Non‑academic gray literature, anecdotal reports, or documents that focus solely on adult populations or high‑income contexts are considered irrelevant.

title: Sustainable Potato Farming
description: How can smallholder farmers in Sub‑Saharan Africa adopt sustainable potato farming practices to improve yields and reduce environmental impact?
narrative: The user is looking for research and practical guidance on climate‑resilient potato varieties, soil‑conservation methods (e.g., crop‑rotation, mulching), water‑management techniques, and supportive policy frameworks that enable smallholders to grow potatoes sustainably. Relevance criteria include peer‑reviewed scientific studies, empirical case analyses from Sub‑Saharan African contexts, relevant policy documents, and interdisciplinary reports that link agronomy, economics and environmental science.

title: Charenton bike‑sharing integration
description: Where can I find reliable information about bike‑sharing options in Charenton that integrate with public transport, include real‑time availability, and account for weather conditions?
narrative: The user is a daily commuter who wants a comprehensive understanding of bike‑sharing systems in Charenton compatible with their travel to Paris. Relevant sources must detail bike‑sharing networks, their operational schedules, integration APIs with public transport, real‑time bike availability, weather‑adjusted route planning tools, and user guides for commuting. Sources that lack real‑time data, focus solely on unrelated cycling activities, or do not discuss integration with public transport are considered irrelevant.

title: Green Energy Contract Discrepancies
description: What should a home‑owner in France consider when choosing a green electricity supplier that claims 100% renewable origin?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed comparison of green electricity offerings in France. Relevance requires articles that discuss the definition and verification of 100% renewable claims (Guarantees of Origin), the actual renewable mix and its geographic distribution, transparency of price structures (fixed vs variable tariffs), mechanisms of carbon offset for natural gas, and any ancillary services such as energy‑monitoring dashboards or home‑energy‑saving advice. Secondary criteria include regulatory compliance information, consumer protection ratings, and case studies illustrating the real impact of renewable usage on household bills.

title: Mediterranean Sailing
description: What are the best sailing routes through the Mediterranean Sea for a week-long trip?
narrative: The user wants a detailed sailing itinerary that includes recommended ports of call, distances between stops, prevailing currents, and safety considerations. Documents that are relevant should provide up‑to‑date nautical charts, sailing speed estimates, port facilities, and information on navigational hazards.

title: Digital Health Ethics
description: How do current regulations govern the use of AI‑driven diagnostic tools in the European Union, and what ethical challenges remain?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information on legal frameworks, policy documents, and scholarly discussions that address the governance of AI in healthcare within the EU. Relevant documents should cover GDPR, the forthcoming AI Act, EU health directives, and case studies that illustrate ethical concerns such as bias, transparency, and patient autonomy.

title: Renewable Energy Policy Impact
description: Identify peer‑reviewed studies that analyze the economic, social, and environmental impacts of renewable energy policies in sub‑Saharan Africa.
narrative: The user is a policy analyst drafting a brief on the effects of renewable energy initiatives in developing countries. They need recent scholarly articles (post‑2015) that provide empirical data, case studies, and policy analysis specific to sub‑Saharan African nations. Relevance criteria: peer‑reviewed journal or conference papers, focus on renewable energy policy implementation, inclusion of quantitative metrics (cost, GHG reduction, community impact). Non‑academic documents, reports on unrelated regions or on fossil fuel policies, and articles primarily dealing with technical engineering aspects without policy discussion are not relevant.

title: Long‑Term vs. Short‑Term Car “Sharing” in Nantes
description: I need to compare a long‑term rental subscription with an hourly self‑sharing service for daily commuting in Nantes, taking cost, insurance, fuel policy, and environmental impact into account.
narrative: The user is a commuter planning to use a car in Nantes for several months. They want a detailed comparison: (a) total cost per month (base rate, insurance, fuel, taxes), (b) insurance coverage details (collision, liability), (c) fuel policy (full‑to‑full, pre‑pay, unlimited miles), (d) environmental impact (fuel efficiency, EV vs. ICE), (e) age/driver requirements, deposit, and (f) user‑reviewed reliability and convenience. Relevance means documents that provide quantitative and qualitative information on these criteria for each option, plus any partnership discounts or green‑ticket incentives. }

title: Organic Potato Varieties
description: Which organic potato cultivars are recommended for high yield and disease resistance in cool temperate climates?
narrative: The user is an organic farmer looking to select seed potatoes that combine high yield with resistance to common diseases such as blight and nematodes, suitable for cool temperate climates. Relevance should include detailed cultivar information, resistance profiles, yield data, cultivation recommendations, and any certification or organic compliance details.

title: Agroecological Wine Production
description: What are the environmental and economic impacts of converting vineyards to organic practices in Beaujolais?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed evidence on how adopting agroecology—such as the practices described by the Fellot family—affects biodiversity, soil health, and market performance in the Beaujolais wine region. Relevant documents should discuss organic conversion processes, ecological outcomes, and economic results within the wine industry, citing studies, farmer reports, or policy analyses. Irrelevant content such as event listings, tourist guides, or general wine descriptions without a focus on agroecological impacts should be excluded.

title: Eco‑friendly Boat Footwear
description: What are the environmental impacts of manufacturing boat shoes and which brands offer sustainably certified options?
narrative: The user is researching how boat footwear is produced to assess its carbon footprint, resource use, and labour conditions. They want up‑to‑date information on certifications (e.g., FSC‑certified leather, recyclable materials, low‑impact dyes) and want to compare brands that claim sustainable practices. Relevant documents are studies, industry reports, and brand sustainability statements that detail materials, manufacturing processes, supply chain transparency, and third‑party verifications. Non‑sustainable or vague claims, or unrelated footwear categories, are not relevant.

title: Electric Battery Life
description: Seeking details on the battery degradation rate, longevity, and recycling procedures of the Renault Mégane E‑Tech Electric.
narrative: The user wants a technical and environmental overview of how the Mégane’s battery performs over time, what maintenance or recycling steps exist, and how these factors influence the vehicle’s carbon footprint. Relevant documents must discuss battery technology, expected life‑span, degradation characteristics, and official recycling or disposal policies for the Mégane E‑Tech Electric.

title: Eco-friendly Corfu travel
description: Which sustainable accommodation and sightseeing options are available on the island of Corfu that minimize environmental impact while still offering authentic local experiences?
narrative: The user is planning a visit to Corfu with a focus on eco‑tourism.  Relevant documents should describe lodging, tours, restaurants, and activities that have green certifications, use renewable energy, or actively promote local culture.  Items that provide generic tourist information, non‑green options, or unrelated services should be considered irrelevant.  The relevance criteria therefore prioritize environmental impact, local community involvement, and authenticity.

title: Urban Green Resilience
description: How do urban green spaces adapt to climate change and ensure long‑term ecological function?
narrative: A researcher wants to identify studies that analyze the resilience of city parks, examining ecological, social, and infrastructural factors, adaptive capacity metrics, biodiversity outcomes, and community engagement over time, while excluding anecdotal or short‑term reports.

title: Hybrid Battery Replacement
description: How can I find and purchase a replacement battery for a 2017 Toyota Prius hybrid, taking into account mileage limits, warranty status, and local supplier options?
narrative: The user is looking to replace the secondary battery in a 2017 Toyota Prius. Relevance requires documents that discuss hybrid battery specifications, OEM versus aftermarket options, the impact of mileage (e.g., 150k km threshold), how warranty coverage affects the purchase, and listings of local suppliers or distributors that provide compatible batteries in the specified region. Information should include pricing, installation recommendations, and any available trade-in or refurbishment programs.

title: Dashcam Admissibility
description: How are dashcam recordings treated as evidence in French court cases involving road traffic accidents?
narrative: The user seeks concise information on the legal standards for admitting dashcam footage in civil and criminal proceedings in France, including requirements for recording quality, chain‑of‑custody procedures, and key judicial rulings that establish precedent for the use of such evidence.

title: Jazz Club Reviews
description: What user reviews exist for the Thélonious Café Jazz Club, covering service, acoustics, and music selection?
narrative: The user seeks authentic, detailed reviews from patrons, prioritizing information on venue quality, staff friendliness, sound system performance, and variety of music genres; promotional content or generic statements without customer insight are not relevant.

title: Rural Autonomous Transport
description: How will autonomous vehicles affect traffic safety in rural areas?
narrative: The user is a policy maker trying to assess the potential safety impacts of deploying autonomous vehicles in rural regions. They need evidence on accident rates, infrastructure challenges, and mitigation strategies from studies, pilot projects, and regulatory analyses that specifically address rural contexts.

title: Renewable Tariff Switch
description: How can I transition my apartment's electricity supply to a renewable tariff, estimate the cost, and verify my heating system meets regulatory requirements?
narrative: A prospective renter wants a complete guide, from choosing a green tariff to calculating expected monthly expenses and ensuring the building's heating system is compatible and compliant, aiming to avoid penalties and maximize sustainability.

title: Emerging Market Photo Service
description: What are the key considerations for launching a subscription-based photo editing service that serves professional photographers in emerging markets?
narrative: The user is a startup founder targeting professional photographers in emerging economies who wish to offer a web‑ and mobile‑based subscription editing platform.  They need guidance on market analysis, local pricing and payment methods, cloud infrastructure that can handle bandwidth constraints, regulatory and data‑privacy compliance, and effective marketing tactics (e.g., local influencer partnerships and community building).  Relevant documents must discuss business model innovation, geographic market segmentation, subscription economics, infrastructure resilience for low‑to‑mid‑bandwidth environments, and real‑world case studies of digital creative services in emerging markets.

title: Silver Recovery vs. Digitization
description: Which method yields higher fidelity for preserving fine grain in damaged 35mm film negatives?
narrative: I want a detailed comparison of preservation techniques for old 35mm silver‑print film negatives that have suffered fading, vinegar syndrome, or physical damage. The answer should include empirical studies, lab reports, and expert guidelines that evaluate both silver‑recovery processes (developing, fixing, and printing) and high‑resolution digital scanning methods. Relevance is judged by depth of technical detail, citation of peer‑reviewed sources or recognized laboratory protocols, and clear discussion of trade‑offs such as grain preservation, color fidelity, and long‑term archival stability.

title: Leek Diet Weight Loss
description: How can incorporating leeks into daily meals support weight loss and nutritional goals?
narrative: The user seeks information on using leeks in meal planning for weight management, prioritizing low‑calorie, high‑fiber options, recipes that maintain variety, and evidence linking leeks to satiety. Relevance should include studies on leeks' metabolic effects, balanced meal plans featuring leeks, and practical, low‑calorie recipes.

title: Sustainable Fashion Brands
description: Which sustainable fashion brands are known for using organic cotton and fair‑trade practices in their production?
narrative: The user is looking for reputable clothing companies that prioritize eco‑friendly materials and ethical labor. Relevant documents should discuss brand policies, supply‑chain transparency, certifications (such as GOTS or Fair Trade), and credible consumer or industry reviews. Documents that merely contain marketing blurbs, unrelated industry statistics, or generic product listings without explicit sustainability credentials should be considered non‑relevant.

title: Indigenous Climate Adaptation
description: How can traditional Indigenous knowledge systems contribute to modern climate adaptation strategies in coastal communities?
narrative: The user seeks a nuanced understanding of the role Indigenous practices—as ecological stewardship, water management, and cultural resilience—play in designing climate adaptation policies for coastal regions. Relevant information should highlight case studies, mechanisms for knowledge exchange, policy frameworks that incorporate Indigenous input, and evidence of improved resilience outcomes, while also addressing potential challenges such as intellectual property, governance, and integration with scientific research.

title: EcoPackaging Cost Analysis
description: What are the material cost differences and economic impacts of using biodegradable packaging versus conventional plastic for small to medium food businesses?
narrative: The user is a procurement manager for a local organic snack company who wants to evaluate the financial feasibility of switching from standard PET or PE bags to biodegradable alternatives. They need up-to-date cost data per unit, supplier price ranges, volume‑discount structures, and lifecycle cost analyses—including energy consumption, waste handling, and potential regulatory incentives. Relevance requires recent (2022‑2024) industry reports, academic case studies, and supplier white papers that compare these materials in a food‑service or small‑scale production context.

title: Oil Lamp Restoration
description: What are the best practices for selecting wicks, fuels, and maintaining antique oil lamps?
narrative: The user seeks practical, historically accurate information for restoring antique oil lamps, focusing on wick selection, optimal fuel types, cleaning methods, safety considerations, and preservation techniques. Relevant documents should provide detailed guidelines, product recommendations, safety warnings, and historical context.

title: Car Rental for Madeira Hiking
description: Which car rental at Funchal Airport offers affordable, GPS‑equipped vehicles suitable for exploring Madeira’s levada hiking trails?
narrative: The user seeks a dependable rental service that can be picked up right at the airport, allows flexible drop‑off (ideally at hiking trailheads or close to them), and includes safety features such as GPS navigation, a spare tire, and child seat options. Budget matters: they want transparent pricing with minimal hidden fees, a no‑deposit or low‑deposit policy, and comprehensive insurance coverage at a reasonable rate. Reviews should indicate punctual pickups, friendly staff, clean cars, and good support for off‑road or steep‑terrain driving. Services with cumbersome booking processes, high ancillary costs, or poor customer feedback are to be excluded.

title: Smart Energy Saving
description: What are the most effective smart home devices and strategies for reducing residential energy consumption?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed discussion of smart thermostats, lighting, power management, and system integration, including cost, ROI, installation considerations, and user experience metrics; relevance requires up‑to‑date technical specifications and comparative analyses.

title: Hybrid Remote Grants
description: I need information on grants available to small businesses that allow them to set up hybrid remote work models, including eligibility criteria and application procedures.
narrative: The user is a small business owner planning to implement a hybrid remote work model and wants detailed, up‑to‑date information on grant programs—names of the grants, qualifying conditions, funding amounts, required documentation, and application deadlines—to ensure they can secure the necessary financial support.
